name: SwitchBot
description: SwitchBot channel plugin for OpenClaw — real-time device status
author: SwitchBot Team

token.description: SwitchBot API token from developer settings

secret.description: SwitchBot API secret from developer settings

monitorDeviceIds.description: Device IDs (MAC addresses) to monitor in real-time. When MQTT receives events from these devices, the message will be analyzed by the LLM and displayed in chat. e.g. ["B0E9FE000915", "eb64ab5360bcb1d2c3ewbm"]

token.label: API Token
token.placeholder: Get from SwitchBot App Developer Settings

secret.label: API Secret
secret.placeholder: Get from SwitchBot App Developer Settings
